operational_gaps: All 17 IFC species now map to governed Juniper PLANTING trade categories backed by existing budget unit costs.
The Thymus praecox ‘Minus’ groundcover mapping honestly converts 528 IFC elements into 16.5 flats using the documented 32-elements-per-flat formula.
Pinus densiflora 'Globosa' remains a real scope mismatch: IFC shows 5 elements while the budget line still carries qty 2.
The governed contract fixture remains a representative Juniper workbook row because the full operational workbook export is not array-shaped in the governed schema.
Live Pixeltable Juniper project rows are not present on the bridge surfaces, so this run still proves the bounded contract path rather than project-addressable bridge rows.
